## Executive Summary
Meta posted $51.2B in Q3 FY2025 revenue, up 26% year over year, and delivered $20.5B in operating income with a 40% margin. The quarter also showed heavy investment intensity: expenses rose to $30.7B and capital expenditures reached $19.4B, driven by servers, data centers, and n

claims.answer_preview:
## Executive Summary
NVIDIA delivered a record Q3 FY2026 quarter with revenue of $57.0B. [TRANSCRIPT] Management said demand continues to exceed expectations and cited visibility to $500.0B of Blackwell and Rubin revenue from the start of this year through the end of calendar year 2026. [TRANSCRIPT]
